articles.title: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
articles.preview: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response.
articles.full_text: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response.
articles.meta_description: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship

articles.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
articles.preview: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.
articles.full_text: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.
articles.meta_description: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies

articles.title: Military-age Ukrainian men could lose EU protection
articles.preview: The European Commission has suggested withdrawing protection status for military-age Ukrainian males. A number of EU countries support the move — and so does Kyiv.
articles.full_text: The European Commission has suggested withdrawing protection status for military-age Ukrainian males. A number of EU countries support the move — and so does Kyiv.
articles.meta_description: Military-age Ukrainian men could lose EU protection

articles.title: More than 110 active mobility devices seized in nine-day operation between LTA and police
articles.preview: Common offences detected included the keeping of non-compliant e-bikes or using improper, obscured or tampered number plates.
articles.full_text: Common offences detected included the keeping of non-compliant e-bikes or using improper, obscured or tampered number plates.
articles.meta_description: More than 110 active mobility devices seized in nine-day operation between LTA and police
